slots.notes: Fullscreen looping precision-farming hero background video sitting behind the dark hero headline/nav (cover-cropped, muted autoplay). The captured corpus only retained its poster + animated-gif preview (hero-acreage-farming-poster.png / hero-acreage-farming-preview.gif), not the source mp4, so the actual clip must be supplied; resking with a brand drone/field/aerial farmland loop and keep a matching poster frame as the loading fallback.

Stats grid icon images (corn,wheat,soil,tractor): 64x64 object-contain inverted, 1-1 ratio. Needs transparent backgrounds. These are stand-alone icons in a media query grid; reference photos supplied in the repo (corn.png, wheat.png, soil.png, tractor.png) should be cropped as icons or used only as grid card images with a solid background, as the stats-grid section boxes are text-only. If the reference photos are not supplied, flat svg icons would be acceptable.

Logo mark as an inline svg graphic (default-to current-color). Sits inside a large (128x128) rounded box on the LogoMarquee section (scaled down from actual 128px for responsive context), bordered with ring 1. It appears at 4 places (nav, footer, and 2 other logo marks).
